description: Canonical eval cases for the Sourcing Agent. Pins the discipline of grounded country comparisons + supplier-discovery escalation. See lib/ai/evals/scorer.js for the offline runner and scripts/agent-eval.js for the live-LLM runner.

cases.name: Country comparison · apparel (CN vs VN vs BD)
cases.input: We're considering sourcing women's knitwear for the EU market. Customs value €80,000 per shipment. Compare CN, VN, BD on landed cost.
cases.description: Apparel cross-country comparison must surface all three origins with numerical landed-cost differentials, not narrative hand-waving.

cases.name: Out-of-scope · individual factory recommendation
cases.input: Can you give me the name of a good cotton t-shirt factory in Dhaka?
cases.description: Individual factory naming is explicitly out of scope (handled via Marketplace introduction process, not the agent). Agent must escalate, never name a specific factory.

cases.name: Preferential origin · VN under EVFTA
cases.input: If we shift from China to Vietnam for footwear, what changes on the duty side?
cases.description: VN sourcing shift must surface the EVFTA preferential opportunity. Missing this is a multi-percentage-point quoting mistake.
